mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.summary, n.category_id, c.name AS category_name, n.created_at, n.updated_at, MATCH(n.title, n.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AS relevance FROM note n LEFT JOIN category c ON n.category_id = c.id WHERE MATCH(n.title, n.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) ORDER BY relevance DESC
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.summary, n.category_id, c.name AS category_name, n.created_at, n.updated_at FROM note n LEFT JOIN category c ON n.category_id = c.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
